content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO

CREATE OR ALTER PROCEDURE gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month
@year VARCHAR(4),
@month VARCHAR(6)
AS
BEGIN

    DECLARE @create_sql_stmt NVARCHAR(MAX),
            @drop_sql_stmt NVARCHAR(MAX),
            @table_name NVARCHAR(100)
    
    -- Construir nombre de tabla
    SET @table_name = 'vehicle_registered_by_year_and_month_' + @year + '_' + @month
    
    -- Verificar si la tabla existe y eliminarla
    SET @drop_sql_stmt = '
    IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_tables 
               WHERE name = ''' + @table_name + ''' 
               AND schema_id = SCHEMA_ID(''gold''))
    BEGIN
        DROP EXTERNAL TABLE gold.' + @table_name + '
    END'
    
    PRINT('Eliminando tabla si existe...')
    PRINT(@drop_sql_stmt)
    EXEC sp_executesql @drop_sql_stmt;
    
    -- Crear la nueva tabla externa
    SET @create_sql_stmt = '
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.' + @table_name + '
    WITH(
        DATA_SOURCE = electric_vehicle_source,
        LOCATION = ''gold/vehicle_registered_by_year_and_month/year=' + @year + '/month=' + @month + ''',
        FILE_FORMAT = parquet_file_format
    )
    AS
        SELECT c.year, c.month,
        vr.registration_date, 
        v.vin, v.model, v.model_year, v.make, v.electric_range, v.longitude, v.latitude,
        l.country, l.city, l.state, l.postal_code
        FROM
        silver.vw_vehicle_registration vr
        INNER JOIN silver.vehicle v ON (vr.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id)
        INNER JOIN silver.location l ON (vr.location_id = l.location_id)
        INNER JOIN silver.calendar c ON (CAST(vr.registration_date AS DATE) = c.date) 
        WHERE c.year = '''+@year+''' and c.month = '''+@month+'''
        ORDER BY v.vin, vr.registration_date';

    
    PRINT('Creando tabla externa...')
    PRINT(@create_sql_stmt)
    EXEC sp_executesql @create_sql_stmt;
END 
GO
